title: rerun_cirrus_cron workflow always fails
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

The GitHub action retrun_cirros_cron always fails because it is misconfigured. The third step contains both `run` and `uses` which according to the error message is not allowed.

See [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/actions/runs/3408369275) as an example

comments.body: Thanks, I'll take care of it.
